title: Create: Paintings
description: Adds 6 Create Mod styled Paintings to the Game.
body:
A mod that currently adds 6 Create Mod styled Paintings, more Paintings coming soon™️.
To get the paintings just cycle through the vanilla ones, the modded ones will appear eventually
(Currently all of them are 1x1).
While this Mod is obviously intended to be played with Create, it will work perfectly fine without it.
